query:
-- What billing item descriptions exist for customers who have Telstra services?
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  bi.category,
  COUNT(*) as item_count,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bi.customerExternalId) as customer_count
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
)
GROUP BY bi.description, bi.category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- What billing item descriptions exist for customers who have Telstra services?
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  bi.category,
  COUNT(*) as item_count,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bi.customerExternalId) as customer_count
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
)
GROUP BY bi.description, bi.category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 30;
